author: abuibrahim2
description: Easily add Quran verses and translations.

manifest.author: AbuIbrahim2
manifest.description: This is a Quran Lookup plugin for Obsidian. This replaces chapter:verse shorthand with verse text in arabic and translation.
manifest.name: Quran Lookup

name: Quran Lookup

releases.author: abuibrahim2
releases.description:
# Fixing Arabic Keyboard in Search Modal for Mobile and Tablet

- Nothing big in this version. Just allowing the arabic keyboard to be draggable on mobile/tablet devices
- Arabic keyboard not best for those devices, better for them to use the native OS keyboards for AR language support

releases.author: abuibrahim2
releases.description:
# Offline mode, Text String Search in Translation and Arabic
### New in Version 0.3
1. Support for Offline Mode for downloading and retrieving verses and translations from the locally downloaded full Quran & Translations
2. Add a _NEW_ command to search for a verse using search API (displaying results in a dialog) or Offline store and insert into note
3. Added more arabic font options
4. Added error notification for when 'surah not found' or 'ayah' index out of range

releases.author: abuibrahim2
releases.description:
# Multiple Languages, Translators, and Display Settings
This is a long delayed update to the plugin.

### New Features
A number of new features have been added in v0.2.

- The ability to **hide or show the translation**, useful for those who only want the Arabic verse to be displayed
- **All translation language(s) selection**, now users can get any language and translations that the API provides. This removes the previous custom translator option as all options exist now in the present options. 
- **Arabic Styling Options** with CSS so that the Arabic text can display using more appropriate font-family and font-size. This adds the choice for a few nicer looking Arabic fonts, as well as font-size selection options
- **Display Container types**, text-only, markdown table, and more Obsidian Callout customization
- **Live Preview** in the Settings screen so you can see what a setting change would look like in Obsidian

releases.author: abuibrahim2
releases.description:
# Initial Release
### Core Functionality Added
- `surah_number:ayah` text replacement with verse and translation
- `surah_number:ayah_start-ayah_end` range replacement
- surah written name resolution with fuse added
- setting to remove parenthesis on translations
- setting to choose english translation type
